> A bug is more than a failing feature. Please explain whether the issue could affect architectural guarantees such as determinism, module independence, or data contract integrity.

## Possible architectural impact

<!--
Does this bug affect any of the following?
- Deterministic behaviour (same input no longer produces same output)
- Module independence (a module depends on unexpected data)
- Data contracts (a type does not match its definition)
- Session persistence (save or load produces incorrect state)
- Other architectural guarantee

If you are unsure, say so — we will investigate together.
